negative_controls.description: Leave the CSV-only seed implementation unchanged.
negative_controls.expected_failure: API and legacy inputs, normalization, rejection, precedence, and regression-test requirements remain unmet.

negative_controls.description: Make CSV outrank API during duplicate resolution.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The hidden cross-source duplicate selects CSV instead of API.

negative_controls.description: Use banker's rounding instead of decimal round half up.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The hidden half-cent amount rounds to 100 rather than 101 USD cents.

negative_controls.description: Sort rejects in legacy, CSV, API order.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Rejected rows violate the required API, CSV, legacy ordering.
A valid API invoice is rejected instead of normalized to paid.

negative_controls.description: Implement the importer but omit the required regression test.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The verifier's CSV-only mutant survives the visible test suite.

negative_controls.description: Accept date-shaped strings without validating calendar dates.
negative_controls.expected_failure: The hidden invalid month is accepted rather than rejected.

negative_controls.description: Count blank legacy lines when assigning row_ref.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Legacy reject row numbering differs from the non-empty-line contract.

negative_controls.description: Stop uppercasing invoice IDs before duplicate resolution.
negative_controls.expected_failure: Case variants no longer merge into one canonical invoice.
